title: coleus tetradenifolius
intro: Coleus tetradenifolius, also known as the Coleus plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The medicinal properties of Coleus tetradenifolius include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Coleus tetradenifolius include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Coleus tetradenifolius is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
